mapper.select:
SELECT id ,author_name ,report_title ,report_type ,security_code ,company_code ,security_type ,data_source ,crte_time FROM sirm_report_in
is_deleted = 0
AND report_title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{reportTitle}, '%')
AND security_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{securityCode}, '%')
AND report_type = #{reportType}
AND crte_time >= #{crteTimeStart}
AND crte_time <= CONCAT(#{crteTimeEnd}, ' 23:59:59')
ORDER BY crte_time DESC ,id DESC

SELECT id ,author_name ,source_org_name ,report_title ,report_type ,security_code ,company_code ,security_type ,data_source ,crte_time FROM sirm_report_out
is_deleted = 0
AND report_title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{reportTitle}, '%')
AND security_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{securityCode}, '%')
AND report_type = #{reportType}
AND crte_time >= #{crteTimeStart}
AND crte_time <= CONCAT(#{crteTimeEnd}, ' 23:59:59')
ORDER BY crte_time DESC ,id DESC
